title: zehneria alba
intro: Zehneria alba, also known as the White Spurred Celery, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zehneria alba include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
